name: Yosenju Wind Worship
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>仙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>風</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かざ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>祀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>り
desc: If you control 3 or more "Yosenju" Monster Cards with different names: Return as many "Yosenju" Monster Cards you control to the hand as possible, then you can draw until you have 5 cards in your hand. You can only activate 1 "Yosenju Wind Worship" per turn.
eff: If you control 3 or more "Yosenju" Monster Cards with different names: Return as many "Yosenju" Monster Cards you control to the hand as possible, then you can draw until you have 5 cards in your hand. You can only activate 1 "Yosenju Wind Worship" per turn.

action: Returns from your field to your hand
